title: /tra
text: /tra Compile keyboard translation tables. /tra { /aft= DateTime } { /bef= DateTime } { /fil FileName } { Library } Switches /aft= or /bef= /fil Parameters Library —name of the library containing the objects to compile; if omitted, all keyboard translation tables are compiled. You can use wildcard characters to specify a group of libraries. Use With ide.exe —Uniface IDE Description The location of compiled translation tables is determined by the $RSO path. Related Links Compiling from the IDE Command Line The IDE command line can be used to compile multiple objects without opening the IDE. It is especially useful for automating compilation by means of batch scripts. Keyboard Translation Tables A keyboard translation table maps a sequence of input codes received from a keyboard or database to logical function codes and characters recognized by Uniface. /key Build keyboard translation tables in a character-based interface.
